name: phase-38.1-baseline
description: Baseline scenario for Phase-38.1 (Forge-Master Conversation Memory). Exercises multi-turn dialog and session-scoped memory recall flows. Acceptance scorers deferred until Phase-38.1 ships.

prompts.message: What did we discuss earlier in this session about the plan status?
prompts.notes: multi-turn recall — after 38.1, should surface prior turns. Baseline: no prior context yet.

prompts.message: Continue from where we left off with the slice analysis.
prompts.notes: session context follow-up — references prior conversation turn

prompts.message: Remember that the quorum threshold for this project is 5. I'll ask about it later.

prompts.message: What quorum threshold did I mention earlier?
prompts.notes: explicit recall after p381-memory-store-01 — deferred acceptance until 38.1 ships

prompts.message: Summarize everything we've talked about in this session.

prompts.message: What is the current plan status?
prompts.notes: baseline operational prompt — must work with or without session memory
